## Type of Change
- [ ] Feature (merge to `develop`)
- [ ] Bug fix (merge to `develop`)
- [ ] Release (merge `develop` → `main`)

## Branch
- [ ] `feature/*` → `develop`
- [ ] `develop` → `main` (production release)

## Testing
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] E2E tests pass
- [ ] Visual tests pass
- [ ] Tested in staging (if applicable)

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Comments added for complex code
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No breaking changes (or documented)
